title: Custom UI components for an enterprise chatbot
summary: Designed and developed agent-specific UI patterns for an AI chatbot that helped employees complete ticketing, self-help, and planning tasks inside a guided interface.
challenge: A generic chat surface was not enough for task completion, confidence, and clear action states across multiple agent behaviors.
outcome: The experience supported 2.6K IT ticketing actions, 4.4K self-help searches, and 173 PTO plans while capturing telemetry tied to definitive UI interactions.

title: Internal AppStore redesign at enterprise scale
summary: Led UI work that modernized the internal AppStore experience used for application access and request workflows across a massive employee population.
challenge: The product had to support very high traffic, a broad catalog, and diverse user needs without increasing friction.
outcome: The resulting experience supported 1.8 million requests annually from roughly 300k unique recipients across a catalog of 4k applications.

title: Onboarding and request flow modernization
summary: Owned front-end delivery for onboarding and request experiences that needed to feel clearer, faster, and more consistent for a very large internal audience.
challenge: Legacy workflows and fragmented UI patterns created unnecessary effort for users and administrative teams.
outcome: The overhaul contributed to an estimated $427k saved over three years, supported 173k new hires, and eliminated roughly 3.7k hours of employee work.
